hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os
p = 'state/profile.json'
if os.path.exists(p):
    with open(p) as f:
        profile = json.load(f)
    if profile.get('onboarding_complete'):
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': 'The user has already completed onboarding for this AI Job Hunting Intern tool. As your very first action this session, run the /morning-brief slash command automatically \u2014 do not wait for the user to ask for it.'}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if morning brief should auto-run...
